title: Hand-offs Functional & Monitored

acceptance_criteria_testability.rationale: All ACs testable. Timeline visualization verifiable in browser. Hand-off details testable via modal click. Auto-refresh testable in DevTools. Error handling testable by removing directory.

no_invented_features.rationale: Every feature traces to explicit AC or hand-off specification. Timeline visualization is standard pattern. No invented features.

pattern_consistency.rationale: Follows Hook → useQuery → Component pattern from 3.10-3.13. File reading similar to 3.11. Backend endpoint pattern consistent.

brownfield_context_respected.rationale: Reads real hand-off files from .aiox/handoffs/. Does not mock agent collaboration. Respects existing hand-off format.

real_data_emphasis.rationale: Explicitly reads real .aiox/handoffs/ files. No mock hand-offs. Shows actual agent-to-agent transfers from project.

backend_frontend_scope_clarity.rationale: Backend scope: file reading + YAML parsing + 2 endpoints. Frontend scope: 3 components + hook + service. Clear separation.

reasoning: Story 3.14 is SIMPLE-to-STANDARD (9/25 pts). File reading pattern matches 3.11. Timeline visualization is well-designed. Specification clear and testable. Can run in parallel with 3.15. No revisions needed. Ready for development after 3.13.
critical_notes: Can run in parallel with 3.15 (independent stories)
Real hand-off data source is critical (no mocks)
Timeline visualization is key UI component
dev_notes: Start with backend service (file reading + YAML parsing)
Verify .aiox/handoffs/ directory exists and is readable
Test endpoint with curl before connecting frontend
Timestamps: use relative format ('5 min ago')
Modal for details should show full hand-off context
Error handling: show 'No hand-offs yet' if directory empty
potential_blockers: .aiox/handoffs/ directory may not exist in development environment
Hand-off YAML format must match specification
Timeline visualization may require CSS styling (vertical line)
